title: Into the Multiverse
description: Explore the multiverse and discover many worlds beyond our own.
body:
![Into the Multiverse Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdcd2a71a59a46aef61a36797790c20e96a9b87b.png) ### If you want to commision a mod, message @u1timatej7 on Discord.



![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d92f4f8144073f9c01354b45b117069a1231d3b.png) This mod adds several new dimensions into Minecraft. Some of them are very similar to the Overworld, while other are completely different. By using amethyst as fuel, you can travel between dimensions and explore worlds beyond your own. 



![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc747eccc95b55882dfe36a25430a5702cbe19d4.png) Traverse into the multiverse and discover an assortment of unique dimensions. Craft new mutiversal gear such as the world hopper or dimensional pearls Discover both new and old mobs, like the Moobloom, the Glare or the Shroomers. Build new golems to help with various tasks. Examples include the mud golem who collects dropped items or the plank golem that shoots arrows.



![Getting Started](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6afd9508c10e642c4aab7021df0466b0ff5feabe.png) To begin your journey, you will need to find an amethyst geode. Amethyst shards are an essential resource for multiversal travel, so you will want to stock up on it. Next you need to craft a dimensional pearl, using an ender pearl and a block of amethyst. But these pearls are incredibly unstable, as they will transport you to a random dimension when thrown. For a safer and less-random trip, you will need to craft the world hopper. The world hopper is a wrist-worn and amethyst powered device that allows players to travel to any dimensions they have discovered. Unfortunately, the only way to discover new dimensions is with the dimensional pearl; no one said multiversal travel would be easy.



![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd70172f74bd355f96076493ae9451698f1b0a20.png) To learn more about the mod and its future updates, check out our official discord server for the mod! Join with this link: https://discord.gg/rpGTkJ5R4t. If you are playing on any version greater than or including 1.19.3, enable the experimental data pack to preview blocks and mobs for the Blazing Dimension. ### Sound Credits: - zapsplat.com, - "Exotic Creature Song, 01.wav" by Inspector
